transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Bridgeway Health Line, this is Nora, your care navigation assistant. What's going on today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, um, I've had this really bad headache since yesterday and now I'm feeling kind of dizzy.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'm sorry you're dealing with that. On a scale of one to ten, how severe is the headache right now?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Maybe a six. It's not the worst I've ever had, just constant.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay. Have you had any vision changes, slurred speech, numbness, or weakness on one side?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, none of that. Just the headache and dizziness when I stand up.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That's helpful to know. Any fever, neck stiffness, or recent injury to your head?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No fever, no injury. I just haven't been drinking much water the last couple days.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That could definitely be contributing. Given no red-flag symptoms, this sounds like it could be dehydration-related, but I'd like you to see your primary care doctor within the next 24 hours to be safe.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay, that makes sense. Can you help me find an appointment?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, I see Dr. Whitfield at Cedar Grove Clinic has an opening tomorrow at 9:15 AM. Would you like me to book that?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Yes, please book it. Thank you.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're all set for 9:15 AM tomorrow with Dr. Whitfield. In the meantime, please drink fluids and rest, and call back or go to urgent care if symptoms worsen.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Will do. Thanks so much for your help.
